name: James David Shewey
summary: Senior Engineer with 24 years of experience designing, scaling, and securing large-scale distributed systems. Deep expertise in PKI, Linux systems, HA architectures, cloud platforms, and automation.

experience.title: Sr. Systems Engineer
bullets: HA & scalability engineering for 2B+ OCSP/CRL validations per month
PKI lifecycle management including OCSP, CRL, HSMs, and CA/B Forum compliance
Cross-signing support for ISRG / Let’s Encrypt
Migrated 100+ servers from bare metal to virtualized infrastructure
Security remediation, CVE review, and threat assessment
Machine identity management for BYOD and corporate devices
Configuration-as-Code using SaltStack, Puppet, and Terraform
Database HA, clustering, and performance tuning

experience.title: Systems Administrator II
bullets: HA & scalability engineering for Linux-based applications
Deployment of Puppet, Katello, and Foreman
C++ core file analysis and debugging
